title: rosa × dumetorum f. annoniana
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. annoniana, also known as Annona rosea, is a hybrid plant derived from the Rosa dumetorum and Annona species. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum f. annoniana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
